examples: An aide avowed that the President had known nothing of the deals.
An aide was already spinning the senator's defeat as 'almost as good as an outright win'.
A close aide to the prime minister repeated that Israel would never accept it.
Former Bush aide and CNN political commentator Ana Navarro spoke highly of the move.
"I'd rather have 25% who love her than 50% who like her, " says a Dole aide.
